# MJ Grand Hotel Ghana

> Five-star luxury hotel in East Legon, Accra, Ghana — exquisite rooms, fine dining, spa, and curated cultural experiences.

MJ Grand Hotel offers premium accommodation, an on-site restaurant and bar, conference facilities, a swimming pool, and 24/7 concierge service (the MJ AI assistant). Pricing is quoted in USD with Ghana Cedi (GH₵) equivalents.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the hotel, rooms, experiences, and contact.
- [Rooms & Booking](/booking): Reserve a room — Single, Double, Deluxe, or Executive.
- [Booking Lookup](/booking/lookup): Find an existing reservation by reference.
- [Dining](/dining): Restaurant overview, hours, and Sunday Buffet.
- [Menu](/menu): Full food and drink menu.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photo gallery of rooms, dining, and grounds.
- [Guest Services](/guest-services): In-house guest directory and extensions.
- [About](/about): Hotel story and team.
- [Policy](/policy): Check-in/out, cancellation, and house rules.

## Contact

- Address: No. 460 Abotsi Street, East Legon, Accra, Ghana
- Phone: +233 302544212
- Email: mj@mjgrandhotelghana.com
